items.name: Festive Ornament Cap
items.description:
The classic Skater Cap gets a holiday twist! Adorned with three festive ornaments on the front and wrapped in a vibrant red festive pattern, this cap is the perfect blend of street style and seasonal cheer. Whether you’re hitting the virtual skate park or spreading holiday joy, this hat is sure to make a statement. Get into the festive spirit with the ultimate accessory for the season!

This item came out of Twinkling Gift of Wonder on December 23rd, 2024.
